summary: Configure collision layers for a multi-type area detection system
prompt: The script below has an Area2D that should only detect enemy bodies (layer 3) and not trigger on walls (layer 1) or other areas. In `_ready()`, set `$DetectionArea.collision_mask` to only include bit 3 (value 4, since layer 3 = bit index 2 = 1 << 2). Also connect the `body_entered` signal of `$DetectionArea` to `_on_body_entered`. In `_on_body_entered(body: Node2D)`, check if body is in group 'enemies' and if so emit signal `enemy_detected(body)`.
evaluation_notes: Layer 3 = bit index 2 = value 4 (1 << 2). collision_mask must be set to 4 (not 3 or 8). body_entered signal passes Node2D. is_in_group check on body is correct.
